method.eyebrow: From concept to launch, zero detours.
method.intro: No endless meetings, no guesswork. Every stage comes with a clear deliverable, a firm deadline, and a fixed price.
method.block1_text: You pitch your business needs. I tell you straight away if it's doable, which tech fits best, and exactly what it costs.
method.block2_text: I design, I code. You stay focused on your business while I build. No time-wasting syncs — just tangible progress.
method.block3_text: A battle-tested, secure tool that is 100% yours. I walk you through the essentials, then get out of your way.

solutions.intro: Straightforward packages for real-world needs. No vague quotes, no budget creep halfway through.
solutions.card1_desc: A high-speed, mobile-first site designed to turn casual browsers into loyal clients.
solutions.card2_desc: Sell products via secure Stripe payments or sync your calendar for seamless appointment booking.
solutions.card3_desc: Tailor-made back-office solutions: management dashboards, inventory tracking, and automated invoicing.

portfolio.section_title: Four projects started. Four projects shipped.
portfolio.intro: Production-ready applications that run on their own — no hand-holding required.
portfolio.project1_desc: End-to-end e-commerce for an Afro hair salon. Real-time stock, Stripe payments, Brevo newsletters, and an admin panel with PDF invoicing and Colissimo export.
portfolio.project2_desc: Artisan leather goods store featuring a persistent cart, Stripe integration, animated delivery tracking, and automated partial refunds.
portfolio.project3_desc: Community anime library. Automated MyAnimeList sync via Jikan API, personal collection tracking with 6 statuses, and a user rating system.
portfolio.project3_stack: Next.js 16 · Express · PostgreSQL · Prisma · Jikan API
portfolio.project4_desc: Operations platform for a local farm co-op. Weekly basket management, member and producer portals, distribution logs, and PDF contracts.

about.p1: After 18 years leading teams and running field operations, I hung up the tie to come back to my true obsession: the raw mechanics of the web.
about.p2: Those years as a manager left me with a sharp, practical lens. I know business owners don't have time for jargon — they need tools that work. I have an eye for friction. I can tell immediately what's slowing your users down, what's making an interface feel heavy, or where something just rings false.
about.p3: That's what this Comptoir is built on. No hollow promises. What brings us together is a brief to honor and a result to deliver.
about.p4: We align on the foundations, I forge the architecture, and I don't close my editor until the machine does exactly what was agreed upon. My job is to write solid code so you can focus on yours.

contact.intro: Describe your needs below. If it's a match for my expertise, we'll hop on a focused 15-minute call to lock in the technical scope.
contact.field_description_placeholder: Keep it factual: what are the must-have features?
